properties.SQL Query:
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    annual_income::numeric,
    credit_score,
    vehicle_age,
    insurance_duration,
    previous_claims,
    health_score::numeric,
    composite_risk_score::numeric,
    estimated_monthly_premium::numeric,
    customer_ltv_proxy::numeric,
    risk_tier,
    age_group,
    gender,
    location,
    policy_type,
    income_segment,
    education_level,
    occupation,
    marital_status,
    customer_feedback,
    data_quality_tier,
    claim_profile,
    risk_category
FROM raw_gold.fact_customer_insurance
LIMIT 500;
